profile: I connect the mainframe to the modern world — building the service layers and APIs that let decades-old banking infrastructure talk to everything new. I’ve shipped both sides: assembler at the core and Node.js in the cloud. That range is rare, and it’s what makes the integration work stick.

highlights: Built integration paths between core mainframe systems and modern distributed services — reliable contracts that both sides can trust.
Own the full picture: assembler at the transaction layer, APIs at the service boundary, and web frontends for internal tooling.
Drive traceability and observability improvements so production issues get found fast, not discovered by customers.
Designed and shipped Node.js APIs powering a real-time analytics product — stable interfaces under fast iteration.
Built AWS deployment pipelines and owned the full delivery path from code to production.
